properties.description: Объединяет UI создания Session и первой Task в один экран; имя сессии становится необязательным и по умолчанию формируется как "{Категория} — {дата/время}".
properties.title: Inline-создание первой задачи + опциональное имя сессии с авто-генерацией

properties.description: На странице задачи показать читаемый контекст сессии (Session.name) над заголовком "Задача" в виде кликабельной хлебной крошки. Заменяет сырой UUID сессии. API: GET /tasks/:id обогащается блоком session: {id, name}.
properties.title: Session context on task detail page

properties.description: Extend ModelProfile with routing metadata (model_kind, api_shape, endpoint_path, capabilities) and create ChatCompletionLog for text-LLM telemetry. Enables admin to register new api.kie.example.invalid text models (gpt-5-2, gpt-5-4, gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-3-flash-v1beta) and dispatcher (UC-202) to select correct HTTP adapter per call.
properties.title: api.kie.example.invalid text-LLM models support

properties.description: Replace free-text model_name in ModelProfile form with provider-filtered ComboBox sourced from new ProviderModelCatalogEntry (hybrid seed + manual Refresh). On model change, autofill api_shape/endpoint_path/model_kind/capabilities from catalog with diff banner and allow override (overrides_catalog flag). New UC-306 manages catalog browsing + per-provider Refresh.
properties.title: ModelProfile model picker + provider model catalog

properties.description: Make workflow step order visible and editable: add step_order to WorkflowStepConfig, Flow-view with drag-and-drop on UC-305 page, grouped+numbered dropdown on UC-302 page.
properties.title: Workflow Step Ordering (Flow-view + Grouped Dropdown)

properties.description: End user restarts a failed/timeout task via POST /api/content/tasks/:taskId/restart. Backend atomically resets status to queued and re-enqueues the first step; frontend shows RestartTaskButton on the task detail page.
properties.title: Restart Failed Task
